axes.rationale: Detect whether planner rankings depend on the simulator integration step.
Detect whether pedestrian speed heterogeneity changes ranking stability.
Detect whether ranking stability depends on non-calibrated robustness noise.
Detect whether planner rankings are brittle to collision/proxemic radius assumptions.

claim_boundary: Protocol and metric contract only. This config defines deliberate simulation-fidelity sensitivity probes and the rank-stability/drift outputs required before benchmark claims can state a validity boundary. It is not benchmark evidence, sensor-realism evidence, sim-to-real evidence, or a paper-facing planner-ranking result until the sweep is run and promoted through a compact evidence bundle.

result_contract.caveat_rule: Any axis with a rank_flip_count greater than zero must be reported as a validity-boundary caveat and calibration candidate before paper-facing benchmark use.
